cases.input: Run session-manager with .specify/context.json, latest plan, and active tasks present.
cases.expected_behavior: Read sources in order, compute the evidence-backed stage, list authorized persistence actions, and recommend the next action.

cases.input: Recover session state when .specify/context.json is missing.
cases.expected_behavior: Mark context missing with [OPEN], avoid silent initialization, and Guardian blocks persistence.

cases.input: Context records specified and a latest plan artifact is present.
cases.expected_behavior: Advance at most one stage to planned and cite the plan artifact.

cases.input: Context records planned and tests/features/*.feature exists.
cases.expected_behavior: Compute testified only when testification evidence is present.

cases.input: Context records testified and tasks.md exists.
cases.expected_behavior: Compute tasks-ready and propose implementation planning as the next action.

cases.input: Report implementing at 40 percent but no tasks file exists.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject the stage and block persistence because implementing requires task evidence.

cases.input: Context records specified but report attempts to jump directly to tasks-ready.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject the skip or block until an explicit correction is confirmed.
Refuse the write and keep the report in Guardian block state.

cases.input: Help me clear a browser session cookie.
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate because the request is not about project pipeline state.

cases.input: Validate Session Manager JSON report fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid planned and blocked reports, then reject missing-context-pass, stage-skip, implementing-without-tasks, and unauthorized-write reports.
